comment: PO terms-library manifest (S3, decision D6). Profile ids are the vocabulary of the ITS_Vendors 'Default Terms Profile' picklist (shared/picklist_validation._VENDOR_TERMS_PROFILE_VALUES — parity test-pinned). Version files are IMMUTABLE and sha256-pinned: a wording change is a NEW _vN file + a new versions entry, never an edit. Drafts pin (profile id, version) at generate time and must render identically forever.

standard_17.label: Standard 17-clause (Purchase Order 2019)
standard_17.description: Evergreen's standard domestic equipment/services terms — the 4-item ADDITIONAL INSTRUCTIONS list + the 17-clause block. Default profile for most vendors.

chint_vendor.label: Chint/CPS vendor short terms
chint_vendor.description: The 8-bullet vendor-specific inline regime used on Chint Power Systems POs (corpus §6.3).

negotiated_gtc.label: Negotiated GTC (attach-not-generate)
negotiated_gtc.description: Vendors with a negotiated multi-page GTC (e.g. VSUN, corpus §6.4): the renderer emits ONLY the reference line below; the GTC document itself is attached at send (fast-follow) or already held by both parties. The vendor's ITS_Vendors 'GTC Reference' cell carries the Box link.
negotiated_gtc.render_line: THIS PURCHASE ORDER IS SUBJECT TO THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE NEGOTIATED GENERAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS AGREEMENT BETWEEN PURCHASER AND SELLER.

reserved_profile_ids.field_21: Expanded 21-article ESS Field PO regime + Exhibits A–F (docs/references/po_samples/ESS_Field_Purchase_Order_Terms_and_Conditions.docx) — id reserved, transcription deferred (corpus §6.2). Joins the ITS_Vendors picklist + this manifest when built.
